title: Immersive Walk
description: This mod lets you walk slower with by pressing a key. It also works while riding horses and modded mounts.
body:
# Immersive Walk You can follow development, devlogs, and future updates for free **[here 📝](https://www.patreon.com/collection/2146365?view=expanded)** And if you'd like to support the project you can grab me a [**Ko-fi** ☕](https://ko-fi.com/javieljefe) [![Cover](https://i.imgur.com/83QcmPt.png)](https://www.patreon.com/posts/157868171)

Mod Collection ⚔️

   

--- This mod adds a more immersive way to **walk** slowly by using the **Caps Lock** key by default (**the keybind can be changed in the in-game options**). Also works while **riding horses** and **modded mounts**. ![Main](https://i.imgur.com/8R1hLfn.gif) ### **First Person View** ![First Person](https://i.imgur.com/7eqO77e.gif) You can also adjust your **walking speed** or **toggle hold key** to walk in-game through "**Mods - Config**" with NeoForge, or by editing the "**immersivewalk-common.toml**" file. ![Config](https://i.imgur.com/VkKpLgS.png) ### **Horses and Modded Mounts** ![Mounts](https://i.imgur.com/0HNnxi2.gif) It's also compatible with my mod [**Villagers Reborn**](https://modrinth.com/mod/villagers-reborn) making it more immersive when walking alongside your follower villagers! ![Villagers Reborn](https://i.imgur.com/oI1HwZn.gif) Minecraft **1.20.1**, **1.21.1** and **26.1.2** with NeoForge (Fabric coming soon!). Works in **singleplayer**, **multiplayer**, and **LAN**.
